import tkinter as tk
import requests

class NewspaperSummarizerApp:
    def __init__(self, root):
        self.root = root
        self.root.title("Newspaper Summarizer")

        self.label = tk.Label(root, text="Enter Newspaper URL:")
        self.label.pack()

        self.newspaper_url = tk.Entry(root, width=50)
        self.newspaper_url.pack()

        self.summarize_button = tk.Button(root, text="Summarize", command=self.summarize)
        self.summarize_button.pack()

        self.summary_label = tk.Label(root, text="Summary:")
        self.summary_label.pack()

        self.summary_text = tk.Text(root, height=10, width=50)
        self.summary_text.pack()

        self.question_label = tk.Label(root, text="Ask a question about the summary:")
        self.question_label.pack()

        self.question_input = tk.Entry(root, width=50)
        self.question_input.pack()

        self.ask_button = tk.Button(root, text="Ask", command=self.ask_question)
        self.ask_button.pack()

        self.answer_label = tk.Label(root, text="Answer:")
        self.answer_label.pack()

        self.answer_text = tk.Text(root, height=5, width=50)
        self.answer_text.pack()

    def summarize(self):
        url = self.newspaper_url.get()
        response = requests.post("https://api.claude.ai/summarize", json={"url": url})
        if response.status_code == 200:
            summary = response.json().get("summary", "No summary available.")
            self.summary_text.delete(1.0, tk.END)
            self.summary_text.insert(tk.END, summary)
        else:
            self.summary_text.delete(1.0, tk.END)
            self.summary_text.insert(tk.END, "Error fetching summary.")

    def ask_question(self):
        question = self.question_input.get()
        summary = self.summary_text.get(1.0, tk.END)
        response = requests.post("https://api.claude.ai/ask", json={"question": question, "context": summary})
        if response.status_code == 200:
            answer = response.json().get("answer", "No answer available.")
            self.answer_text.delete(1.0, tk.END)
            self.answer_text.insert(tk.END, answer)
        else:
            self.answer_text.delete(1.0, tk.END)
            self.answer_text.insert(tk.END, "Error fetching answer.")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    root = tk.Tk()
    app = NewspaperSummarizerApp(root)
    root.mainloop()

        self.answer_label = tk.Label(master, text="Answer:")
        self.answer_label.pack()

        self.answer_text = tk.Text(master, height=5, width=50)

class PaperSummarizerApp:
    def __init__(self, master):
        self.master = master
        master.title("Paper Summarizer")

        self.label = tk.Label(master, text="Enter the paper text:")
        self.label.pack()

        self.paper_text = tk.Text(master, height=10, width=50)
        self.paper_text.pack()

        self.summarize_button = tk.Button(master, text="Summarize", command=self.summarize_paper)
        self.summarize_button.pack()

        self.summary_label = tk.Label(master, text="Summary:")
        self.summary_label.pack()

        self.summary_text = tk.Text(master, height=10, width=50)
        self.summary_text.pack()

        self.question_label = tk.Label(master, text="Ask a question about the summary:")
        self.question_label.pack()

        self.question_entry = tk.Entry(master, width=50)
        self.question_entry.pack()

        self.ask_button = tk.Button(master, text="Ask", command=self.ask_question)
        self.ask_button.pack()

        self.answer_label = tk.Label(master, text="Answer:")
        self.answer_label.pack()

        self.answer_text = tk.Text(master, height=5, width=50)
        self.answer_text.pack()

    def summarize_paper(self):
        paper = self.paper_text.get("1.0", tk.END)
        response = requests.post("https://api.claude.ai/summarize", json={"text": paper})
        summary = response.json().get("summary", "Error generating summary.")
        self.summary_text.delete("1.0", tk.END)
        self.summary_text.insert(tk.END, summary)

    def ask_question(self):
        question = self.question_entry.get()
        summary = self.summary_text.get("1.0", tk.END)
        response = requests.post("https://api.claude.ai/ask", json={"text": summary, "question": question})
        answer = response.json().get("answer", "Error getting answer.")
        self.answer_text.delete("1.0", tk.END)
        self.answer_text.insert(tk.END, answer)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    root = tk.Tk()
    app = PaperSummarizerApp(root)
    root.mainloop()

import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import filedialog, messagebox
import requests

class DocumentSummarizerApp:
    def __init__(self, root):
        self.root = root
        self.root.title("Document Summarizer")
        
        self.upload_button = tk.Button(root, text="Upload Document", command=self.upload_document)
        self.upload_button.pack(pady=10)
        
        self.summary_button = tk.Button(root, text="Get Summary", command=self.get_summary)
        self.summary_button.pack(pady=10)
        
        self.summary_text = tk.Text(root, height=10, width=50)
        self.summary_text.pack(pady=10)
        
        self.dubiousness_label = tk.Label(root, text="Ask about dubiousness:")
        self.dubiousness_label.pack(pady=5)
        
        self.dubiousness_input = tk.Entry(root, width=50)
        self.dubiousness_input.pack(pady=5)
        
        self.dubiousness_button = tk.Button(root, text="Ask", command=self.ask_dubiousness)
        self.dubiousness_button.pack(pady=10)
        
        self.document_content = ""

    def upload_document(self):
        file_path = filedialog.askopenfilename()
        if file_path:
            with open(file_path, 'r') as file:
                self.document_content = file.read()

    def get_summary(self):
        if not self.document_content:
            messagebox.showerror("Error", "Please upload a document first.")
            return
        
        response = requests.post("https://api.claude.ai/summarize", json={"text": self.document_content})
        if response.status_code == 200:
            summary = response.json().get("summary", "No summary available.")
            self.summary_text.delete(1.0, tk.END)
            self.summary_text.insert(tk.END, summary)
        else:
            messagebox.showerror("Error", "Failed to get summary from API.")

    def ask_dubiousness(self):
        question = self.dubiousness_input.get()
        if not question:
            messagebox.showerror("Error", "Please enter a question about dubiousness.")
            return
        
        response = requests.post("https://api.claude.ai/ask", json={"question": question})
        if response.status_code == 200:
            answer = response.json().get("answer", "No answer available.")
            messagebox.showinfo("Dubiousness Answer", answer)
        else:
            messagebox.showerror("Error", "Failed to get answer from API.")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    root = tk.Tk()
    app = DocumentSummarizerApp(root)
    root.mainloop()

        data = {"text": text, "context": context} if context else {"text": text}

        if response.status_code == 200:

        else:
